reviews.comment: Great experience using Frederick Window Tinting for the first time. Prompt, Professional, friendly and explained everything for post installation care. Definitely recomend!

reviews.comment: These guys are amazing. I went in with my Tesla Model 3 for all around tint (33% sides/rear & 70% on windshield) and a full front PPF. They did a great job and were very kind. Super responsive to texts and pricing is great. Highly recommend!

reviewReply.comment: We're overjoyed to hear your glowing feedback! Your positive vibes about the tinting and PPF means the world to us. It's wonderful you found our team easy to communicate with and our prices satisfying. We're here whenever you need us again!

reviews.comment: I decided to tint my VW Atlas and I came across Frederick Window Tinting. I had a quick conversation with Sharyn and she quickly got me in for my service the next day. I had schedule constraints so they worked to accommodate those constraints and provided the best service and tint application I have ever received. If there was a rating above 5 stars, that’s what I would give them!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for your amazing review! It's wonderful to hear that Sharyn and the team were able to accommodate your schedule and provide top-notch service. Your feedback truly brightens our day! We can't wait to serve you again in the future.

reviews.comment: Danny, Sharyn, and the team are awesome and always do a very professional and clean job. They are quick to respond to any inquires and don't mind taking the time to sit and talk to you about your options. Top notch customer service.  I've used FWT for two of our personal vehicles (one just a couple weeks ago) and to tint-match a busted window for my work ride a couple years ago. I plan on using them again in the future and always recommend them to friends and family.

reviewReply.comment: We're so grateful for your kind words and continued trust in us! It's heartening to know that our team has consistently met your expectations. We look forward to helping you again soon and are thrilled you're spreading the word about our services. Warmest thanks for your incredible support!

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsRFpYWklabUoyVjBodFpWcGZVbFZrYkU5QllVRRAB

reviews.comment:
I had an excellent experience with Frederick Window Tinting from start to finish. The entire team was professional, knowledgeable, and clearly takes pride in their work.

Ms. Volpe was fantastic to work with—responsive, organized, and incredibly helpful throughout the process. She made scheduling easy, answered all my questions, and ensured everything ran smoothly. Her professionalism and attention to detail really stood out.

The General Manager, Daniel Carrera, was equally impressive. He took the time to make sure the job was done right, explained the options clearly, and ensured the final result exceeded expectations. It’s rare to see leadership so hands-on and customer-focused.

The quality of the tinting was top-notch, completed efficiently, and the workspace was left clean and professional. You can tell they value both craftsmanship and customer satisfaction.

If you’re looking for a reliable, professional window tinting company in Frederick, I highly recommend them. I wouldn’t hesitate to use their services again.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for your glowing review! We are delighted that you had such a positive experience with our team. It's wonderful to hear that both Ms. Volpe and Daniel were able to assist you in making the process smooth and satisfying. Your kind words truly motivate us to keep providing excellent service. We’d love to have the opportunity to serve you again in the future!

reviews.comment: Tint was quick and good. Lack of care for interior of car. Did not clean up spray and has since diminished my leather.

reviewReply.comment: Hey there! We do our absolute best to return vehicles in a better condition then when they arrived. I'm truly sorry if we didn't meet your expectations in doing so. Looking forward to hearing back from you.

reviews.comment: I always go to Sharon and her team for window tinting, and they are fantastic! They’re super patient, super helpful, and guide you through exactly what you need. The ceramic tint with heat rejection is like night and day in any vehicle. Trust me, it’s worth it! I’ve had at least four vehicles done here, and every single time I’ve been completely pleased with the results. Being on a budget I’ve been curious about some of the cheaper places sure, but do you really know what you're getting? I always come back because of FWT’s team’s excellent service and workmanship. I recommend them to everyone. With FWT, you know you’re getting quality work you can trust.

reviewReply.comment: Hi AJ, your loyalty truly warms our hearts! We're delighted to know our service and ceramic tint met your expectations. It’s fantastic to be your choice for all your vehicles. We look forward to continuing to provide you with outstanding service!
